hooks.command: if echo "$FILEPATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$FILEPATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

if echo "$FILEPATH" | grep -qvE '(server|actions|queries|api|edge|functions)' && grep -l 'service_role\|supabaseAdmin\|SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE' "$FILEPATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: service_role key detected in client code!' && exit 1; fi; exit 0
